The recent news of soaring pump prices driving US inflation to its highest level in almost two years may lead to a stronger US dollar, as the Federal Reserve may be more inclined to tighten monetary policy, which could negatively impact the EUR/USD pair.
Rising US inflation may prompt hawkish Fed expectations, strengthening USD. EUR_USD is ranging but could break lower on inflation-driven USD strength.

The increase in US inflation may lead to a potential rate hike by the Federal Reserve, strengthening the USD against the EUR, and the current ranging trend may break to the downside. This scenario is likely to unfold over the next 4-8 hours as market participants react to the inflation news.

headlines: Soaring pump prices drive US inflation to highest level in almost two years
